name: Mint-Glazed Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, steam carrots over boiling water until just tender-crisp.
2. Drain the carrots.
3. Heat butter in a deep skillet.
4. Add carrots, lemon juice, and sugar to the skillet.
5. Cook over medium heat, occasionally shaking the pan, until the carrots are coated.
6. Add chicken broth and continue cooking slowly until the liquid is evaporated and the carrots are light golden in color.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Stir in the chopped fresh mint.
9. Serve immediately.
